mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS id, s.product_id AS productId, p.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName, p.unit AS unit, s.quantity AS quantity, s.shelf_status AS shelfStatus, s.min_stock AS minStock, s.max_stock AS maxStock, s.update_time AS updateTime FROM stock s INNER JOIN product p ON p.id = s.product_id ORDER BY s.id ASC

SELECT s.id AS id, s.product_id AS productId, p.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName, p.unit AS unit, s.quantity AS quantity, s.shelf_status AS shelfStatus, s.min_stock AS minStock, s.max_stock AS maxStock, s.update_time AS updateTime FROM stock s INNER JOIN product p ON p.id = s.product_id WHERE s.product_id = #{productId}
SELECT id, product_id AS productId, quantity, shelf_status AS shelfStatus, min_stock AS minStock, max_stock AS maxStock, update_time AS updateTime FROM stock WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock ( product_id, quantity, shelf_status, min_stock, max_stock ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{shelfStatus}, #{minStock}, #{maxStock} )
mapper.update: UPDATE stock SET min_stock = #{minStock}, max_stock = #{maxStock}, update_time = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE stock SET quantity = #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE stock SET shelf_status = #{shelfStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId}

UPDATE stock SET shelf_status = #{shelfStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE product_id IN
#{pid}
